name: 墨谷乡
short_description: A small game for writing leisure, by writing a word to obtain a piece of ink field and different ink gas, through the gathering spirit can temporarily improve the speed of obtaining Mogu Valley
detailed_description:
"Mogu Valley" is a casual writing construction class small game, by writing a word to obtain a piece of ink field and different ink gas, through the spirit can temporarily improve the speed of obtaining ink gas, to create their own Mogu Valley

Game play

Simple gameplay, through continuous writing, accumulate achievements, to create their own Mogu Valley

Original intention of production

Just want to write notes (drawing board can be used), feel the value change, win achievements

Game experience enhancement

  • A book to remember

  • A writing pad to write on
